creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #2)
Typical version bump and make makesum.  One minor change to the pkg-plist based on the salt/states/apt.py file getting renamed salt/states/aptpkg.py upstream.

Ref: https://github.com/saltstack/salt/commit/785d27707f77399c0aeb5bd550ebefac13f1ee07
